summary: L1-L3 gap-bounding theory for the SGT channel-MI shape-blindness negative result: PASS after 2 fix rounds. Headline split accepted — structural allocation-blindness (L2, independent of A4) proven; weak-attack arm left open. Exact-match Fano converse, convex-reparam global minimizer, corrected cosine bound (2 D_tot E||e0||^-2) and DCT tail limit all verified.
